name: Athasian Elf
description: Humanoid. Medium. Athasian elves are tall desert runners adapted to the wastes. Elven Lineage grants supernatural abilities at character levels 1, 3, and 5, each usable once per day: Weather Sense (predict the weather at your location for the next 24 hours), Dune Runner (your speed increases by 10 for 1 hour), and Mask of the Wild (while in natural terrain, you and chosen creatures within 30 feet gain +10 to Dexterity (Stealth) checks and leave no tracks for 1 hour). Elven Resilience: you have advantage on saving throws against extreme heat or cold. Keen Senses: gain proficiency in Insight, Perception, or Survival. Trance: you do not need to sleep, magic can't put you to sleep, and 4 hours of trancelike meditation provide adequate rest.
